news_bbc.title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
news_bbc.summary: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

news_bbc.title: Beer boom goes flat as breweries call last orders
news_bbc.summary: The UK's brewery scene is shrinking as pubs close, costs rise and drinking habits change.

news_bbc.title: 'I live in survival mode': The rise of the multi-job workforce
news_bbc.summary: More people are taking second jobs as rising costs and insecure work reshape how we earn a living.

news_bbc.title: How Saudi Arabia's spending spree reached the end of the line
news_bbc.summary: MBS's Vison 2030 project seemed the stuff of science fiction. Now reality has bitten

news_bbc.title: Indian billionaires buy foreign companies as growth slows at home
news_bbc.summary: India Inc spent $18bn on global buyouts in 2025 and the deal value could cross $15bn in the first half of 2026.

news_bbc.title: Morocco wants tourists to visit Western Sahara. Some say it's tightening its control
news_bbc.summary: The Moroccan government wants more Western holidaymakers to visit the territory it claims to own.

news_bbc.title: 'Shameful' more spent on benefits than jobs for young people, says Milburn
news_bbc.summary: Reforms are needed of the welfare system to tackle the high numbers of young people not in work or education, says Alan Milburn.

news_bbc.title: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
news_bbc.summary: The largest and most powerful rocket in history blasted off after its first attempted launch was postponed.
